examples.title: Speed Calculation
examples.content: You calculate speed = 100 meters / 5 seconds = 20. You got 20, but 20 what? 20 meters? No! 20 m/s. Unit checking catches that your answer MUST have units of m/s.

examples.title: Force Calculation Wrong
examples.content: You calculate F = m + a = 5 kg + 3 m/s² = 8. But 8 what? You can't add kg and m/s²! Unit checking immediately says: WRONG. Something went wrong in your formula.

examples.title: Energy in Joules
examples.content: You calculate E = m × v² = 2 kg × (5 m/s)² = 50. Unit check: kg × (m/s)² = kg·m²/s² = Joules. Your answer is 50 J. Units match! ✓
